description: Style Note This mid-rise bikini from facit is crafted using the best jersey knit, that lets the fabric contour your hips and allows you to stretch in ease. The bikini provides a smooth Fit without binding, while the printed label on the inside provides abrasion-free comfort. Product DetailsWhite rex stylz brief that has a mid rise modern square cut, stylish faux garter look, double layered contoured pouch for extra room, wide waistband with red and black tipping that provides super soft, smooth and comfortable grip with printed branding for abrasion free comfort Material and Care 100% premium cotton jersey knit Machine wash warm at 40 degrees using a mild detergent Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Tumble dry low
